message:
Add deepMaterializeDoc tape fallback and JSON5 Infinity getValue fallback

Two improvements for JSON5 correctness:

1. deepMaterializeDoc: when JSON.parse fails on a container's source
   (e.g., JSON5 values like Infinity that aren't valid JSON), falls back
   to recursive tape walking via tapeMaterialize(). This handles the
   materialize() and array method (.map/.filter) code paths correctly.

2. EventParser getValue() on complete: when doc_parse_fmt fails for
   JSON5 (Infinity can't be represented in zimdjson's strict tape),
   falls back to ldRoot (the live document built by ptScan) instead
   of throwing. The live document handles JSON5 scalars correctly.

Adds 2 tests: tape export graceful null, EventParser Infinity getValue.
